How It Works
Import your dream car from Japan or Europe in 4 simple steps
1

Choose Your Car

Browse live listings and pick a car, or tell us your budget and preference.

2

Pay Deposit

Secure the vehicle with a KES 200,000 deposit. We source it immediately.

3

We Ship It

Full export documentation, RORO shipping to Mombasa Port. ~4 weeks transit.

4

Drive It

Clear customs with our support, pay balance, and drive your import home.

Best Cars 254
